name: World Finance
description_short: World Finance Dallas, Texas — World Finance offers in-branch personal installment loans, credit building, tax prep, and refund advance loans in Memphis,...
description_long:
World Finance is a national consumer finance company operating hundreds of brick-and-mortar branches across the United States, with this location at 4593 Elvis Presley Boulevard in Memphis, TN. The company positions itself as a community lender — staff not only work in the neighborhoods they serve but live there too. The Memphis branch is managed by Rutherford Brannon and offers bilingual service in Spanish.

The branch's core product is personal installment loans, structured with fixed monthly payments rather than lump-sum repayment. Beyond lending, World Finance offers a bundled suite of financial services: a credit building program, tax preparation, refund advance loans (allowing borrowers to access anticipated tax refunds early), and a motor club providing roadside assistance coverage. This makes it a one-stop financial services provider for customers who may lack relationships with traditional banks.

What sets World Finance apart from online lenders is its strictly in-person model. Loan decisions and servicing happen face-to-face at the branch, where staff walk borrowers through contracts line by line — as noted in customer reviews. This hands-on approach appeals to borrowers who want clarity and direct communication rather than impersonal digital processing. Spanish-speaking staff at this location also serve a broader segment of the Memphis community.

World Finance is best suited for borrowers with limited or damaged credit who need a structured installment loan and prefer in-person guidance. The branch model means no 24/7 online access, and the company does not publicly advertise APR ranges on this page, so prospective borrowers should ask directly about rates before applying. The combination of credit building and tax services alongside lending is genuinely useful for financially underserved consumers, but the cost of borrowing should be confirmed upfront.
pros: Personal installment loans with fixed monthly payments — more structured than payday loans
Credit building program available alongside lending
Tax preparation services offered in-branch — bundled financial services
Refund advance loans let borrowers access anticipated tax refunds early
Roadside assistance (motor club) available as an add-on service
Bilingual service — staff speak Spanish at this Memphis location
In-person one-on-one service with staff who walk through loan contracts in detail
cons: No APR or loan amount ranges disclosed on the website — borrowers must visit or call to learn costs
Strictly in-person model — no prominent online application or account management portal mentioned
Limited hours (Mon–Fri 9AM–5:30PM, Saturday hours unspecified, closed Sundays)
Single branch serving Memphis — not convenient for all parts of the city
Refund advance loans and motor club add-ons may increase total cost of borrowing
best_for: Near-prime or subprime borrowers who want an installment loan with fixed payments
Borrowers who prefer in-person guidance and want their contract explained step by step
Spanish-speaking consumers in Memphis seeking bilingual loan services
Tax filers who want a refund advance and prefer handling loans and taxes in one place
diagnosis: World Finance is best for borrowers with limited credit history who need a structured installment loan and value face-to-face service — particularly Spanish speakers in Memphis. The main caveat is that interest rates are not disclosed online, so consumers must contact the branch directly to understand the full cost before committing.
services: One-on-one financial guidance from branch staff
